title: AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIO OF BINALAYAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TARANGNAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A REGULAR BARRIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5439 / 53 OG No. 19, 6462 (October 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1911, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIO OF BINALAYAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TARANGNAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A REGULAR BARRIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Binalayan in the Municipality of Tarangnan, Province of Samar, is hereby converted into a regular barrio to be called henceforth as the barrio of Binalayan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
